# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.

Prevent api gateway security.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: service-a
    url: http://service-a:8080
    routes:
      - name: route-a
        paths:
          - /api/service-a
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              second: 5
              hour: 1000
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins: 
                - "*"
              methods: 
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - DELETE
              headers: 
                - "Authorization"
                - "Content-Type"
                - "Accept"
              expose_headers: 
                - "X-My-Custom-Header"
              max_age: 3600

  - name: service-b
    url: http://service-b:8080
    routes:
      - name: route-b
        paths:
          - /api/service-b
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              second: 10
              hour: 2000
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins: 
                - "*"
              methods: 
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - DELETE
              headers: 
                - "Authorization"
                - "Content-Type"
                - "Accept"
              expose_headers: 
                - "X-My-Custom-Header"
              max_age: 3600

  - name: service-c
    url: http://service-c:8080
    routes:
      - name: route-c
        paths:
          - /api/service-c
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              second: 15
              hour: 3000
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins: 
                - "*"
              methods: 
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - DELETE
              headers: 
                - "Authorization"
                - "Content-Type"
                - "Accept"
              expose_headers: 
                - "X-My-Custom-Header"
              max_age: 3600
